name: Lemon Teriyaki Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken with cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, combine all ingredients except chicken in a bowl.
3. Cook over medium heat for 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the chicken to the skillet.
5. Simmer until fully cooked, about 30 minutes, over low heat.
